postReview.title: England 1-3 Senegal: Tuchel suffers first defeat as Three Lions boss
postReview.description: It was a night to forget for England who lost for the first time under Thomas Tuchel in a dismal showing against Senegal at the City Ground.

preReview.title: Tuchel urges England to 'play with a smile' in Senegal friendly
preReview.description: England will be looking for an improved display against Senegal after being booed off despite victory over Andorra last weekend.
